name: Confluence ETL Pipeline
description: End-to-end Confluence data extraction and processing using Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) with Fabric Data Factory pipeline orchestration.

tasks.name: Extract from Confluence
tasks.description: Bronze notebook extracts spaces, pages, and comments from Confluence Cloud REST API and writes raw Parquet files to the lakehouse.

tasks.name: Store Raw Data
tasks.description: Raw Confluence data stored as Parquet in the Bronze zone of the lakehouse (confluencelakehouse).

tasks.name: Cleanse and Transform
tasks.description: Silver notebook strips HTML, parses dates, computes word counts, deduplicates, and writes both Parquet and CSV.

tasks.name: Aggregate for Analytics
tasks.description: Gold notebook produces 4 business-ready tables: content by space, author activity, content timeline, and most discussed pages.

tasks.name: Orchestrate Pipeline
tasks.description: Data Factory pipeline (ConfluenceETL) chains the 3 notebooks in sequence: Bronze → Silver → Gold.
